parsed_review.summary: CP00-773 (Migration Platform fixture-evidence + UI-foundation descriptor, Risk C, 150 units, RP25.P05.M06.S19-RP25.P06.M02.S20) is a descriptor-only pack whose production_ready claim is honestly scoped. Manifest, construction-inspection, and adjudication all declare production_ready=false / runtime_ready=false / status=pending_review, and the production_ready_flag (migration_platform_fixture_evidence_ui_foundation_descriptor_verified) is limited to descriptor verification rather than runtime or enterprise trust. Implementation (registry.js/service.js/validators.js) constructs a deep-frozen descriptor whose every row carries descriptor_only=true, runtime_execution=false, and no-payload/no-credential/no-real-data guards, all enforced by validateMigrationPlatformCp773FixtureEvidenceUiFoundationDescriptor; a source scan found no real IO (no fetch/http/fs writes/exec/spawn/process.env/credentials) anywhere in packages/migration/src. Tests assert CP773 binding, coverage distribution (58/28/7/23/18/4/12), runtime-closed descriptor, and contract-latest projection; command evidence shows node --test 55/55 and full npm test 3003/3003 with 0 failures, and all 10 required validation commands plus extras exit 0 with substantive stdout. Hermes patterns are used only for deterministic evidence packet/receipt shape (emits_runtime_receipt=false, hermes_packet_body_included=false), and Claude is held read-only and explicitly not final approver (claude_is_final_approval=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true). CP178+ hardening checks pass: auth preflight succeeded (exit 0, 1449-byte non-empty stdout), prompt 2642<25600 bytes, no forbidden tools, summary-only correctly prohibited, review schema present. No findings at any severity. The pending_review state of claude-review-result.json/adjudication is the expected pre-review condition that this receipt resolves, not a defect. The pack does not claim runtime or enterprise trust, so it does not block goal closeout; final enterprise-trust approval remains a human authority outside this receipt.
